companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Company names or domains to search (e.g. 'stripe.com', 'Acme Corp').

decisionMakerTitles.title: Decision maker job titles
decisionMakerTitles.description: Job titles to find (e.g. Head of HR, CTO). User can add or remove from defaults.

regions.title: Regions
regions.description: Optional. Restrict to these countries/regions (e.g. 'United States', 'United Kingdom'). Leave empty for global.

maxResultsPerCompany.title: Max results per company
maxResultsPerCompany.description: Optional cap on number of decision makers per company.
